commits: fix(test): cache APEX health check in gotoTerminal to avoid redundant waits

fixes.description: Added force:true + waitForURL to clickSidebar for reliable Next.js client-side nav; cached health check in gotoTerminal to prevent timeout on multi-page tests
Added _safe_get_info and _safe_get_calendar methods to YFinanceMarketDataClient wrapping yfinance .info/.calendar in try/except for symbols (SMH, SOXX, XSD) that 404 on fundamentals

Restored original non-idempotent intraday cron job IDs (arb_opportunity_scan_intraday, prediction_markets_agent_cycle_intraday, world_cup_agent_cycle_intraday) to maintain separate job identity from SCHEDULE entries
